steps.title: Identify the goal in the sentence
steps.content: The blank is what's hard to do to "the spread of unwelcome weeds." The rest of the sentence ("hard to remove them completely") signals that the gardener is trying to stop the weeds from spreading.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
Halting means stopping — exactly the action a gardener takes against spreading weeds. Retrieving (getting back), saving (preserving), and pretending (faking) don't fit stopping unwanted growth.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
